description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a symmetrical front facade, featuring a steep, dark gable roof and two prominent side wings. The exterior is clad in light gray horizontal siding, complemented by brick accents around the entryway and corners. The front entrance is accessed by twin staircases leading up to a small landing, flanked by two round shrubs and bordered by low metal railings. Large, multi-pane windows are arranged in regular rows on all sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The landscaping includes a paved walkway with decorative planters, enhancing the curb appeal. The overall design is traditional, with balanced proportions and classic architectural details.
description: A two-story, symmetrical house with a steep gable roof, light gray siding, brick accents, and a formal front entry with twin staircases and decorative landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with twin staircases, brick accents, large windows, and decorative landscaping.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the horizontal siding, side windows, and the continuation of the walkway and planters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat expanse of siding with regularly spaced windows and no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side windows, siding, and landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with twin staircases, small landing, brick accents, and flanking shrubs
